meaning: n.住在印度西北国境的阿富汗人
examples: Except at harvest-time, when self-preservation requires a temporary truce, the Pathan tribes are always engaged in private or public war.
A steady flow of the coveted weapons spread its genial influence throughout the frontier, and the respect which the Pathan tribesmen entertained for Christian civilization was vastly enhanced.
Pathan even gave his mobile number and talked to people posing as Salman.
After Jeremy Bray's stumps were splattered, solitary slip Yusuf Pathan collected two excellent catches.
Sachin Tendulkar (39), Virender Sehwag and Irfan Pathan (both 35) were responsible for India's flying start.
